summary: Mobile-first gaming and entertainment website (CK444/ASIF969 style) with dark theme, neon accents (gold and blue), built with React and Tailwind CSS. Features sticky header with register/login and winners marquee, dynamic hero slider, categorized game grid, real-time sidebar, and footer with payment icons.
architectural_notes: Built with React and Tailwind CSS; deep charcoal background (#121212) with vibrant yellow (#FFD700) primary buttons and neon gold/blue accents
Mobile-first design mandatory; bottom nav bar for mobile (Home, Wallet, Promo, Profile)
Dark-themed sleek aesthetic with neon accents (gold and blue)
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Dark neon gaming website hero banner with gold and blue neon light streaks on a #121212 background, abstract casino/gaming motifs (cards, dice, slots reels) (hero-banner-1.dim_1440x560.jpg)
- Dark neon gaming promotional banner with 'Welcome Bonus' text area, gold coins and confetti on dark background (hero-banner-2.dim_1440x560.jpg)
- Dark casino-themed promotional banner with 'VIP Rewards' neon text glow, crown and gem motifs on dark background (hero-banner-3.dim_1440x560.jpg)
- Slot machine game card thumbnail with vibrant neon reels on dark background (game-thumb-slots.dim_400x300.jpg)
- Live casino game card thumbnail showing roulette wheel with neon blue lighting on dark background (game-thumb-livecasino.dim_400x300.jpg)
- Sports betting game card thumbnail with neon-lit soccer ball and stadium silhouette on dark background (game-thumb-sports.dim_400x300.jpg)
- Table games card thumbnail showing poker cards and chips with gold neon accents on dark background (game-thumb-tablegames.dim_400x300.jpg)
- Welcome bonus promotional card banner with gold coins shower on dark background (promo-welcome.dim_800x400.jpg)
- Reload bonus promotional card banner with neon blue reload arrow graphic on dark background (promo-reload.dim_800x400.jpg)

existing_features.title: Implement a sticky header with a logo on the left, a 'Register / Login' button on the right, and a scrolling marquee below the nav bar displaying latest winners (e.g., 'User123 won $500 on Slots', cycling continuously).

Build a dynamic hero slider with auto-advancing slides (3–5 slides) for promotions and 'New Game' announcements. Each slide should have a full-width background image, headline text, a sub-heading, and a CTA button. Include manual prev/next controls and dot indicators.

Create a categorized game grid with four tabs: Slots, Live Casino, Sports, and Table Games. Each tab shows a responsive grid of GameCard components with a thumbnail image, game title, and a 'Play Now' button that activates on hover with a scale/glow effect.

Add a real-time sidebar (visible on desktop, toggled on mobile) showing a live feed of recent wins (player name, game, amount) and a leaderboard table (rank, player, total winnings). Populate with mock data cycling at an interval to simulate live updates.

Implement a collapsible left sidebar menu with icons and labels for game categories (Slots, Live Casino, Sports, Table Games, Promotions, VIP). On desktop it is expanded by default; on mobile it collapses to a drawer triggered by a hamburger icon in the header.

Build a top bar (shown when logged in) displaying the user's current balance, a notifications bell icon with a badge count, and a profile dropdown menu with options: My Profile, Wallet, Transaction History, Logout.

Add a mobile bottom navigation bar fixed to the bottom of the screen on mobile viewports with four tabs: Home, Wallet, Promo, and Profile. Each tab has an icon and label. Active tab is highlighted with the gold accent.

Build a mock user authentication flow: a modal or page for Register (username, phone number, password fields) and Login (phone number, password). Include a simulated OTP verification step after registration where the user enters a 6-digit code. Store auth state in frontend context (no real backend auth required).

Create a Wallet page accessible from the top bar and bottom nav. Display current balance, a Deposit section (amount input + Deposit button), a Withdrawal section (amount input + Withdraw button), and a Transaction History table showing date, type (deposit/withdrawal), amount, and status. Use mock data and frontend state management.

Build a minimal Admin Dashboard page (route: /admin) with three sections: User Management (table of mock users with username, phone, balance, status), Bet Tracking (table of recent bets with player, game, amount, outcome), and Withdrawal Approvals (list of pending withdrawal requests with Approve/Reject buttons that update status in frontend state).

Build a Promotions page (route: /promo) listing current promotional offers as cards with a banner image, promo title, description, validity date, and a 'Claim Now' button. Include at least 4 mock promotions (e.g., Welcome Bonus, Reload Bonus, Cashback, Referral).

Build a site footer with three columns: Quick Links (Home, Promotions, VIP, Contact Us), Legal Links (Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, Responsible Gaming), and Payment Methods showing icon logos for Bkash, Nagad, Rocket, Visa, Mastercard. Include a copyright notice and a Responsible Gaming disclaimer.

Apply a consistent dark neon visual theme across the entire application: deep charcoal background (#121212), gold (#FFD700) as the primary accent for buttons and active states, electric blue (#00BFFF) as the secondary neon accent for highlights and borders. Use sharp typography with a modern sans-serif font. All interactive elements should have smooth hover/active transitions (150–200ms). Trust badges (e.g., '18+ Only', 'Secure & Certified') should be visible in the header or footer.

new_feature_requests.summary: Sticky header with Register/Login button and scrolling marquee for latest winners
Dynamic hero slider for promotions and new game announcements
Categorized game grid for Slots, Live Casino, Sports, and Table Games with thumbnails
Real-time sidebar with live feed of recent wins and leaderboards
Footer with Terms & Conditions, Responsible Gaming links, and payment method icons (Bkash, Nagad, etc.)
Collapsible sidebar menu with icons for different game categories
Top bar with user balance display, notifications icon, and profile dropdown
Reusable GameCard component with hover effect and Play Now button
Mobile bottom navigation bar (Home, Wallet, Promo, Profile)
User authentication with phone number-based OTP login
Wallet management with deposit/withdrawal history and automated balance updates
Third-party game provider integration via API
Admin dashboard for managing users, tracking bets, and approving withdrawals
Security: SSL encryption and anti-fraud measures for transactions

Implement a backend Motoko actor to persist user accounts (username, phone, hashed password placeholder, balance) and transaction records (userId, type, amount, timestamp, status). Expose query and update calls for: createUser, getUser, updateBalance, addTransaction, getTransactions.
